original_text: Imperial College London Lahore mai Nawaz Sharif IT City ka campus banane ja rahi hai
english_translation: Imperial College London is going to set up a campus of Nawaz Sharif IT City in Lahore
core_claim: Imperial College London is establishing a campus in Lahore as part of Nawaz Sharif IT City

sources.title: Maryam Nawaz lied. Imperial College London is not opening a campus in Lahore
sources.content:
### Imperial, or not

This weekend, Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N) announced via its official X account that a campus of Imperial College London would be established in the Nawaz Sharif IT City, Lahore. The post stated that the foundation stone for the project would be laid in November and that the campus would also include a modern 300-bed hospital.

Punjab CM Maryam Nawaz officially launched the Nawaz Sharif IT City project for commercial development in May last year. During the inaugura

sources.title: Imperial College London campus to be built in Nawaz Sharif IT City Lahore
sources.content:
The chief minister announced that the foundation stone of the Imperial College London campus would be laid in November within the Nawaz Sharif IT City, where a 300-bed state-of-the-art hospital will also be established.

During the briefing, officials informed the Chief Minister that 78 percent of the construction work on the IT Tower in Nawaz Sharif IT City has been completed. They added that Ravi City is envisioned as Pakistanâ€™s first fully green city, setting new standards for sustainable urb

sources.title: Maryam Nawaz lied. Imperial College London is not opening a campus in ...
sources.content:
### Imperial, or not

This weekend, Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N) announced via its official X account that a campus of Imperial College London would be established in the Nawaz Sharif IT City, Lahore. The post stated that the foundation stone for the project would be laid in November and that the campus would also include a modern 300-bed hospital.

Punjab CM Maryam Nawaz officially launched the Nawaz Sharif IT City project for commercial development in May last year. During the inaugura

sources.title: Imperial College London denies plan to open campus in Lahoreâ€™s Nawaz Sharif IT City | Arab News PK
sources.content:
Senior Punjab Minister Marriyum Aurangzeb said in a social media post on October 18 that the chief minister had chaired a meeting in which â€śimportant decisions were made.â€ť She said an Imperial College London campus will be established in the Nawaz Sharif IT City, which would also include a state-of-the-art 300-bed hospital. She added that the projectâ€™s foundation stone would be laid in November.

â€śReports that Imperial College London plans to open a campus overseas are incorrect,â€ť the UK-based i

reasoning: The evidence from Arab News PK states that Imperial College London denies plans to open a campus in Lahore's Nawaz Sharif IT City, directly contradicting the claim.
